{{Quote|Regret to in...Cap...bridge crew...ously wounded. This is Commander Urhal...der heavy...Repeat: We are under heavy DSF attack.|Commander Urhal to Mace Windu|<ref name="Shatterpoint">[[Shatterpoint (novel)|''Shatterpoint'']]</ref>}}
'''Urhal''' was an officer in the [[Republic Navy/Legends|Republic Navy]] during the [[Clone Wars/Legends|Clone Wars]]. Urhal held the rank of [[Commander/Legends|commander]], and was stationed on the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Republic]] [[Warship/Legends|warship]] ''[[Halleck]]''. In [[21 BBY/Legends|21 BBY]], Urhal was a commander on the [[Cruiser/Legends|cruiser]] ''Halleck'' in [[Haruun Kal/Legends|Haruun Kal's]] orbit during the [[Battle of Haruun Kal/Legends|battle there]]. When a squadron of [[Vulture-class starfighter/Legends|droid fighters]] attacked the ''Halleck'', [[Trent (Republic Navy officer)|Trent]], the commander of the vessel, was injured, and Urhal took over as the commanding officer of the ship. Under the orders of [[Jedi/Legends|Jedi]] [[Jedi Master/Legends|Master]] [[Mace Windu/Legends|Mace Windu]], Urhal deployed the ''Halleck''{{'s}} complement of [[Jadthu-class landing ship/Legends|landers]] and [[Low Altitude Assault Transport/infantry/Legends|gunships]], then ordered the [[Starship/Legends|vessel]] to evacuate the [[Al'Har system|system]], though he questioned the logic of Windu's orders beforehand.

==Behind the scenes==
Urhal first appeared, albeit over comlink, in [[Matthew Stover]]'s [[2003]] novel [[Shatterpoint (novel)|''Shatterpoint'']].
